display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Cinzel uppercase, widely tracked, gold color.

data.purpose: All financial figures. JetBrains Mono with tabular-nums mandatory.

technical.purpose: Technical indicator labels and strategy panel titles. IBM Plex Sans.

shadows.name: gold-glow-subtle
shadows.purpose: Default hover glow on interactive elements.

shadows.name: glow-profit
shadows.purpose: Profit/up state feedback. Overrides gold glow when competing.

shadows.name: glow-loss
shadows.purpose: Loss/down state feedback. Overrides gold glow when competing.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and data animations.

breakpoints.name: desktop-large
breakpoints.purpose: Large monitor optimization. Slightly increased spacing.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Gold filled CTA for primary actions. One per trading panel.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #D4AF37; color: #0A0A0A; border: none; border-radius: 2px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #F0E68C; box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(212,175,55,0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D4AF37; outline-offset: 2px; box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(212,175,55,0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Gold outlined button for secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #D4AF37; border: 1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.3); border-radius: 2px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(212,175,55,0.1); border-color: rgba(212,175,55,0.8); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D4AF37; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: ArtDeco Card
components.description: Default data panel with gold border and no radius for data surfaces.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #141414; border: 1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.3); border-radius: 0px; padding: 16px; transition: border-color 300ms, box-shadow 300ms; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #D4AF37; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(212,175,55,0.4); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; color: #D4AF37; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; color: #F2F0E4; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Data Input
components.description: Text input with gold focus ring. 36px height, sharp corners.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #A0A0A0; } .ds-input { background: #141414; color: #F2F0E4; border: 1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.3); border-radius: 2px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 14px; height: 36px; transition: border-color 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #D4AF37; box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(212,175,55,0.2); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); } .ds-input:disabled { border-color: rgba(212,175,55,0.1); background: #0A0A0A; color: #8B7355; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Toggleable filter chip with gold active state.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: rgba(212,175,55,0.08); color: #A0A0A0; border: 1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.2); border-radius: 2px; padding: 4px 8px; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms; } .ds-chip:hover { background: rgba(212,175,55,0.12); } .ds-chip-active { background: rgba(212,175,55,0.2); color: #D4AF37; border-color: #D4AF37; }

components.name: Navigation Sidebar
components.description: 260px expanded sidebar with Deep Navy-Black background and gold border.
components.html:
MYSTOCKS
DashboardMarketStrategy
components.css: .ds-nav { width: 260px; min-height: 100vh; background: #111118; border-right: 1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.2); padding: 16px 0; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; color: #D4AF37; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; padding: 8px 20px; margin-bottom: 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.2); } .ds-nav-item { display: block; padding: 10px 20px; color: #A0A0A0; text-decoration: none; font-size: 14px; transition: all 200ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #F2F0E4; background: rgba(212,175,55,0.05); } .ds-nav-active { color: #D4AF37; background: rgba(212,175,55,0.1); border-left: 2px solid #D4AF37; }

components.name: Quant Stat Card
components.description: Compact 48px stat card for quantitative trading dashboards. JetBrains Mono data values.
components.css: .ds-quant-stat { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; height: 48px; padding: 8px; background: #141414; border: 1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.2); border-radius: 0; } .ds-quant-stat-label { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #A0A0A0; } .ds-quant-stat-value { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #F2F0E4; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-quant-stat-change { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-quant-up { color: #FF5252; }

narrative.overview: MyStocks is a dark-mode design system for personal quantitative trading and stock analysis. It fuses the theatrical elegance of Art Deco (gold accents, geometric patterns, serif headlines) with the data-density demands of a Bloomberg-style terminal. Geometry as decoration, not ornament. Structured lines, measured frames, repeated motifs, and architectural rhythm replace soft organic decoration. Interactive feedback is deliberate and engineered, never playful or bouncy.
keyCharacteristics: Permanent dark mode, no light mode
ArtDeco sharp geometry: 0px radius for data, 8px for interactive
Gold luminescence elevation, not traditional drop shadows
Three density modes: comfortable, compact, micro-density

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Classical Gold is the single accent. It carries borders, CTAs, active states, and section titles. Bronze is the only permitted secondary, and only for badges and tertiary actions.

rules.name: The Financial Override Rule
rules.body: A-Share Red and Green override gold semantics wherever financial state competes with decorative treatment. Financial glow always beats decorative gold glow on the same element.

rules.name: The Tabular Alignment Rule
rules.body: All financial figures use JetBrains Mono with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. Barlow and Cinzel are forbidden for numeric data.

rules.name: The Data Font Override Rule
rules.body: In data-dense panels showing more than 12 concurrent numeric rows, compact type scale must be used.

rules.name: The Gold-Over-Black Rule
rules.body: Emphasis comes from gold luminescence and controlled halo layers, not generic black shadow stacks.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows and glows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus).

dos: Use tabular-nums for ALL financial figures
Use JetBrains Mono for prices, volumes, percentages, and codes
Maintain red=up/profit and green=down/loss consistency across every screen
Use gold glow shadows on interactive elements
Animate price changes with brief 120-160ms color flashes
Default to sharp corners (0px) for data components
Use compact spacing scale for data-dense views
Place only one primary action per trading panel
Use IBM Plex Sans for technical indicator labels
donts: Never mix market color conventions (always A-Share red=up, green=down)
Never use decorative animations that compete with live market data
Never place more than one primary action per trading panel
Never use Tailwind-blue heroes, identical card grids, or cookie-cutter metrics (generic SaaS)
Never use playful illustrations, pastel UI, or gamified onboarding (consumer finance)
Never use gold indiscriminately or gratuitous animation loops (over-decorated fintech)
Never let multiple flashing cells compete in the same panel
